title: nigritella rhellicani subsp. gabasiana
intro: Nigritella rhellicani subsp. gabasiana is a rare species of flowering plant in the orchid family, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Pyrenees mountains. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nigritella rhellicani subsp. gabasiana include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the roots and rhizomes, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
